title: Graduate School of Social Sciences Main Principles
content:
Graduate School of Social Sciences Main Principles

Mission

The mission of Üsküdar University Graduate School of Social Sciences is to equip its students with the knowledge and skills they will need in a rapidly advancing global society with technological, social, cultural and universal change. To train experts and scientists who are compatible with R&D focuses, adhere to ethical values, creative, universal, and can direct health and science policies.

Vision

To be a respected and preferred education and research institution in cooperation with national and international graduate-schools. Adhering to the core values of our university, we aim for an institutional structure in which all personnel identify with the vision of our university. Our primary goal is to provide education and training in Turkey, at European Union and world standards, by developing high-quality education, training, research and application programs with a command of modern people and people-oriented technology.

Foundation and Purpose

The Graduate School of Social Sciences was established in 2012. Our graduate-school aims to train respected, creative and universal scientists and experts who are competent in their fields by using the experience and knowledge of our university in the fields of behavioral and health sciences with its distinguished teaching staff.
